name: Ana
description: A burst Healer who uses precise skillshots to heal allies and can deny enemy healing.
title: Veteran Sniper
info: As a founding member of Overwatch and one of the world's best snipers, Ana Amari uses her skills to protect the innocent. Though she went MIA after losing her eye, Ana's sense of duty and responsibility has brought her back to the fight.

Ana.name: Healing Dart
Ana.description: Fire a dart which heals the first allied Hero hit for 195 (+4% per level) Health. Does not affect full Health Heroes.

Ana.name: Biotic Grenade
Ana.description: Toss a grenade at the target area. Allied Heroes hit are healed for 152 (+4% per level) Health and receive 25% increased healing from Ana for 4 seconds. Enemies hit take 60 (+4% per level) damage and receive 100% less healing for 1.75 seconds.  If Biotic Grenade does not hit any enemies, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and if Ana is the only target hit, reduce its cooldown by an additional 2 seconds.

Ana.name: Sleep Dart
Ana.description: Fire a dart that puts the first enemy Hero hit to Sleep, Stunning them for 3 seconds. Sleep's effects end instantly if the target takes damage after the first 0.5 seconds.  Cannot be used on Vehicles.

Ana.name: Nano Boost
Ana.description: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.  Cannot be used on Ana.

Ana.name: Eye of Horus
Ana.description: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 (+4% per level) and enemies are damaged for 135 (+4% per level). Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.

Ana.name: Shrike
Ana.description: Basic Attacks apply a Dose to enemies, dealing 40 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds, plus additional damage equal to the current number of stacks on the target, stacking up to 5 times. Every 0.5 seconds, Ana is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Shrike.  Aim Down Sights  Activating Shrike reduces your Movement Speed by 25%, but increases the Range of Healing Dart and Sleep Dart by 25% while also allowing them to pierce one Hero. Lasts until canceled.

1.name: Contact Healing
1.description: Hitting Heroes with Biotic Grenade increases its damage and healing by 30% per Hero hit.

1.name: Slumber Shells
1.description: Reduce the cooldown of Sleep Dart by 2 seconds. Upon waking, enemy Heroes are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds.

1.name: Vampiric Rounds
1.description: Increase Shrike's healing by 15%.  Repeatable Quest: Stack 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 1%.  Repeatable Quest: Basic Attack a Hero with 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 0.25%.

4.name: Biotic Enhancements
4.description: Increase the bonus healing duration of Biotic Grenade by 50% and reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds.

4.name: Overdose
4.description: Sleep Dart applies 4 Doses. While Aim Down Sights is active, Sleep Dart pierces all enemy Heroes.

4.name: Debilitating Dart
4.description: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by 50% for 4 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by 8 seconds.

7.name: Anti-Healer
7.description: Increase the area of Biotic Grenade by 25% and the duration of the healing reduction by 0.75 seconds.

7.name: Night Terrors
7.description: Gain 25% Movement Speed for 2 seconds for every Hero hit by Sleep Dart. Upon waking, enemy Heroes take 8% of their Maximum Health in damage.

7.name: Mind-Numbing Agent
7.description: Every Dose a Hero has reduces their Spell Power by 10%.

10.name: Nano Boost
10.description: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.  Cannot be used on Ana.

10.name: Eye of Horus
10.description: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 (+4% per level) and enemies are damaged for 135 (+4% per level). Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.

13.name: Speed Serum
13.description: Healing Dart grants 25% Movement Speed to affected Heroes for 2 seconds.

13.name: Purifying Darts
13.description: Healing Dart removes Roots and Slows from the target, and heals for 20% more when doing so.

13.name: Smelling Salts
13.description: Healing Dart removes Stuns from the target, and grants them 50 Armor for 2 seconds when doing so.

16.name: Sharpshooter
16.description: Healing Dart's healing is increased by 5% if it heals a Hero, up to 50%. At maximum bonus, further increase its healing by 35%. This bonus is reset if Healing Dart fails to hit a Hero.

16.name: Concentrated Doses
16.description: Increase Healing Dart's healing by 12% for each Dose active on enemy Heroes.

16.name: Active Reload
16.description: Activate to instantly gain 3 charges of Healing Dart.

20.name: Nano Infusion
20.description: Allies affected by Nano Boost heal for 50% of Spell Damage dealt.

20.name: Deadeye
20.description: Eye of Horus cooldown reduced to 6 seconds, but it only regains new rounds every 10 seconds. Remaining cooldown is converted to rounds.  For every Hero Eye of Horus hits, increases its damage and healing by 5%. This bonus resets after leaving Eye of Horus or after 4 seconds.

20.name: Armored Stance
20.description: Increase Shrike's damage by 50%. While Aim Down Sights is active, gain 25 Armor.

20.name: Dynamic Optics
20.description: Basic Attacks increase Attack Speed by 10% for 3 seconds, up to 100%. While Aim Down Sights is active, increase your Basic Attack Range by 4.

tooltipMarkup.AnaBioticGrenade: Toss a grenade at the target area. Allied Heroes hit are healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaBioticGrenadeAllyImpactCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health and receive <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,AnaHealingDartCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BioticGrenadeHealing].Modifier"/>%</c> increased healing from Ana for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaBioticGrenadeAllyBuff,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Enemies hit take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaBioticGrenadeEnemyImpactDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and receive <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaBioticGrenadeEnemyBuff,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[Life]*(-100)" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> less healing for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaBioticGrenadeEnemyBuff,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>If Biotic Grenade does not hit any enemies, reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,AnaBioticGrenadeCooldownRefundNoEnemyHit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds, and if Ana is the only target hit, reduce its cooldown by an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,AnaBioticGrenadeCooldownRefundOnlySelfHitMarker,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AnaBioticGrenadeAntiHealer: Increase the area of Biotic Grenade by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100* (Effect,AnaBioticGrenadeTargetSearchAlly,AreaArray[0].Radius + Talent,AnaBioticGrenadeAntiHealer,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value / Effect,AnaBioticGrenadeTargetSearchAlly,AreaArray[0].Radius + -1) "player = "0"/>%</c> and the duration of the healing reduction by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,AnaBioticGrenadeAntiHealer,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AnaBioticGrenadeBioticEnhancements: Increase the bonus healing duration of Biotic Grenade by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,AnaBioticGrenadeBioticEnhancements,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value-100"/>%</c> and reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,AnaBioticGrenadeBioticEnhancements,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AnaBioticGrenadeContactHealing: Hitting Heroes with Biotic Grenade increases its damage and healing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,AnaBioticGrenadeContactHealingCountTracker,Scale*100"/>%</c> per Hero hit.
tooltipMarkup.AnaDebilitatingDart: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,AnaDebilitatingDart,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaDebilitatingDart,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,AnaDebilitatingDartMissMarkerModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AnaDetachableBoxMagazineActive: Activate to instantly gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaDetachableBoxMagazineChargeBuffApplyBehavior,Count"/></c> charges of Healing Dart.
tooltipMarkup.AnaDynamicOptics: Basic Attacks increase Attack Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,AnaDynamicOptics,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaDynamicOptics,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,AnaDynamicOptics,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*Behavior,AnaDynamicOptics,MaxStackCount"/>%</c>. While Aim Down Sights is active, increase your Basic Attack Range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaDynamicOpticsCarryBehavior,Modification.WeaponRange"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.AnaEyeOfHorusActivate: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Effect,AnaEyeOfHorusGrantCharges,Cost[0].ChargeCountUse" player="0" precision="2"/></c> specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaEyeOfHorusImpactAllyCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> and enemies are damaged for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaEyeOfHorusImpactEnemyDamage,Amount"/></c>. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,AnaEyeOfHorusImpactEnemyDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier*100"/>%</c> less damage to Structures.<n/><n/>Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.
tooltipMarkup.AnaEyeOfHorusDeadeye: Eye of Horus cooldown reduced to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,AnaEyeOfHorusActivate,Cost[0].Cooldown.TimeUse + Talent,AnaEyeOfHorusDeadeye,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[5].Value" player="0"/></c> seconds, but it only regains new rounds every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,AnaEyeOfHorusDeadeye,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value"/></c> seconds. Remaining cooldown is converted to rounds.<n/><n/>For every Hero Eye of Horus hits, increases its damage and healing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,AnaEyeOfHorusDeadeyeAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c>. This bonus resets after leaving Eye of Horus or after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaEyeOfHorusDeadeyeController,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AnaHealingDart: Fire a dart which heals the first allied Hero hit for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaHealingDartCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health. Does not affect full Health Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.AnaHealingDartConcentratedDoses: Increase Healing Dart's healing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,AnaHealingDartConcentratedDosesTokenCounter,Scale*100"/>%</c> for each Dose active on enemy Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.AnaHealingDartPurifyingDarts: Healing Dart removes Roots and Slows from the target, and heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaHealingDartCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[PurifyingDarts].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more when doing so.
tooltipMarkup.AnaHealingDartSharpshooter: Healing Dart's healing is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,AnaHealingDartSharpshooter,Scale*100"/>%</c> if it heals a Hero, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,AnaHealingDartSharpshooter,Scale*100*Behavior,AnaHealingDartSharpshooterTokenCounter,Max"/>%</c>. At maximum bonus, further increase its healing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaHealingDartCreateHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[SharpershooterBonus].Modifier *100"/>%</c>. This bonus is reset if Healing Dart fails to hit a Hero.
tooltipMarkup.AnaHealingDartSmellingSalts: Healing Dart removes Stuns from the target, and grants them <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaHealingDartSmellingSalts,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaHealingDartSmellingSalts,Duration"/></c> seconds when doing so.
tooltipMarkup.AnaHealingDartSpeedSerum: Healing Dart grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaHealingDartSpeedSerum,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed to affected Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaHealingDartSpeedSerum,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.AnaMindNumbingAgent: Every Dose a Hero has reduces their Spell Power by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,AnaMindNumbingAgent,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.AnaNanoBoost: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaNanoBoostModifyUnit,RechargeVitalRate" player="0" precision="2"/></c> Mana. For the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaNanoBoostBuff,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds, they gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaNanoBoostBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaNanoBoostCDDummyEffect,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Cannot be used on Ana.</c>
tooltipMarkup.AnaNanoInfusion: Allies affected by Nano Boost heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,AnaNanoInfusion,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*100"player="0"/>%</c> of Spell Damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.AnaOverdose: Sleep Dart applies <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AnaOverdoseAttackPoisonTraitDotDamageTokenInitialSingleDoseApplyBehavior,Value+Effect,AnaOverdoseAttackPoisonTraitDotDamageTokenSecondaryDosagesApplyBehavior,Value"/></c> Doses. While Aim Down Sights is active, Sleep Dart pierces all enemy Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.AnaShrikeArmoredStance: Increase Shrike's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,AnaShrikeDotDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[ArmoredStance].Modifier"/>%</c>. While Aim Down Sights is active, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaAimDownSightsArmoredStanceArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor.
tooltipMarkup.AnaShrikeVampiricRounds: Increase Shrike's healing by %.Repeatable Quest: Stack 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by %.Repeatable Quest: Basic Attack a Hero with 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by %.
tooltipMarkup.AnaSleepDart: Fire a dart that puts the first enemy Hero hit to Sleep, Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaSleepDart,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Sleep's effects end instantly if the target takes damage after the first <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SleepBreakPrevent,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Cannot be used on Vehicles.</c>
tooltipMarkup.AnaSleepDartNightTerrors: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,AnaSleepDartNightTerrorsMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaSleepDartNightTerrorsMovementSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds for every Hero hit by Sleep Dart. Upon waking, enemy Heroes take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,AnaSleepDartNightTerrorsDamage,VitalFractionMax[0]"/>%</c> of their Maximum Health in damage.
tooltipMarkup.AnaSleepingDartSlumberShells: Reduce the cooldown of Sleep Dart by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,AnaSleepingDartSlumberShells,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds. Upon waking, enemy Heroes are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Behavior,AnaSleepDartSlumberShellsSlowBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AnaSleepDartSlumberShellsSlowBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
